stemHtml: How does the yaw damper operate in manual flight with the Flight Director (FD) on as well as with the autopilot engaged?

options.a: The yaw damper is disabled when FD is selected, and manual rudder control must be used to manage yaw.
options.b: The yaw damper provides stability during manual control and autopilot use, as long as the FD is on.
options.c: The yaw damper only operates during manual flight, and is inhibited when the autopilot is engaged.
options.d: Yaw damper operation remains the same whether the FD is on or not, offering stability during manual flight and with the autopilot engaged.
